Bowser

Bowser is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is the main antagonist and is often depicted as a large, powerful, and menacing character who kidnaps Princess Peach and battles Mario and his friends.

Bowser is known for his spiked shell, horns, and fiery breath. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
